text.title: AWS Infrastructure Design — LLM Prompt Templates Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating the procedure and output contract.

example.title: Architecture design prompt for serverless API
example.code: Intent: design serverless API for 1000 req/sec peak. Template: design-prompt.md. Context: latency target p99 < 300ms, ~10M req/month, single-region us-east-1, compliance: SOC2 in 12 months. Constraints: $500/mo budget. Required output schema: JSON with components[] + cost_estimate + tradeoffs[]. LLM response validated against schema before downstream consumption.
example.note: Every required field populated; rationale cites at least one input by name; owner is a single named handle; version + last_reviewed present.
